title: SAVILAND Rhinestone Nail Glue Gel: 2x20g Strong-Bond Nail Rhinestones Glue Gel with Precision Tip Powerful Grip Nail Charms and Gems Rhinestones for Nails Art Cure Needed
features: Ultra-Strong, Long-Lasting Adhesive: SAVILAND's SSProAcryl X Rhinestone Glue Gel offers superior rhinestones, pearls, and charm hold, with unmatched durability, outperforming most adhesives with nano-tech and lasting 28 days
Fine Needle Tube(0.1mm): The needle-like tip delivers pinpoint accuracy for tiny crystals and intricate designs. Perfectly control glue flow – ideal for delicate nail art details
Non-wipe Formula & Bubble-Free: This feature offers a non-sticky hand texture and creates a bubble-free, high-transparency finish, allowing your nail art to shine at its fullest potential

Natural Ingredients: Plant-based formula with castor oil & vitamin E boosts nail growth, hardness & strength while protecting against damage, Hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin. Enjoy stunning nails without irritation
Easy to Use: The flexible tube allows for one-handed, effortless application, with an ergonomic design for precision and reduced hand strain
